Expected specs: 
 
• Exynos 2600 
• 12GB RAM 
• 256GB / 512GB storage 
• 6.9" foldable OLED display 
• 4.1" cover display 
• 50MP main + 12MP ultra-wide 
• 10MP selfie camera 
• 4,300mAh battery 
• 25W wired charging 
• 15W Qi2.2 wireless charging
